description: This Java class provides a stub implementation of an email provider used for testing or development environments. It logs email details instead of sending real emails, facilitating debugging and testing without dispatching actual emails.

classes.name: StubEmailProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of the EmailProvider interface that logs email send requests instead of actually sending emails.

methods.name: StubEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Logs the email details instead of sending an email, including sender, recipient, subject, event type, draft ID, applicant user ID, and body text.
